_reconstruction_note: Original worker JSON was not captured in chat transcript. Fields below are reconstructed from observed post-conditions (file diffs at the time of dispatch and the resulting 62e6355 commit). Marked fields use null where the original value cannot be recovered.
summary: Reconstructed from effects. Worker wrote 6 ADR entries (DEC-1 through DEC-6) into delegate-kit's .agent-memory/DECISIONS.md, prepended a 2026-05-15 stop-point to workspace HANDOVER.md preserving prior entries, replaced examples/README.md with the per-run convention spec, and made the initial commit 62e6355 staging all top-level non-gitignored files. Main-agent verification (run after the worker reported) passed all 6 acceptance criteria.

changed_files.summary: Six ADR entries DEC-1 to DEC-6 covering project name, license, scope, brief/output format, file ownership, soft-policy framing
New 2026-05-15 stop-point entry, prior 2026-05-11 entry preserved
Replaced PPB default with per-run directory convention (brief.md / output.json / notes.md)

git_state_post_run.committer_identity_note: Auto-configured by git from hostname at dispatch time. Before first public push, git config --local was set to the noreply identity AND history was rewritten via git rebase --root --exec 'git commit --amend --reset-author --no-edit'. All four pre-existing commits were re-authored, changing every SHA. Safety tag pre-identity-rewrite-20260515 preserves the original chain.

validation_results.note: command itself was flawed (preamble masks target); worker passed by semantic check, not literal head -5 output. Documented as a v0.2 lesson.

risks: head -5 validation command was brittle (passed by worker judgment, not literal output)
Commit message body asserts 'No real-run eval yet' but the commit IS the eval — same self-referential staleness as the HANDOVER text. Logged but not amended.
followups: Capture this run's lessons in workspace SUBAGENT_PLAYBOOK and project CONTRIBUTING — completed in dk-v01-lessons (commits c2de801, 4d4f886)
